findings.detail: マルチタスク intro definition says '同时执行多项任务' (simultaneous) without caveat; corrected by p421::2 which explains rapid-switching mechanism. Intentional pedagogical simplification.
findings.text_snippet: 同时执行多项任务。计算机擅长多任务处理。

findings.detail: definition.zh ends with '有时被译为应用软件' but the surface is already 应用软件 — minor redundancy, not technically wrong.
USB appears on both p412 (full definition) and p414 (summary table entry). Expected textbook pattern; not a defect.
